name: /analyze output includes a coverage caveat block when run on a multi-language repo
command: mkdir -p repo && printf 'const x=1\n' > repo/x.js && printf 'package main\n' > repo/main.go && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/analyze.sh" --root repo --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'coverage_caveat:' out.txt && grep -q 'go: partial' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
